excluded_family_note: sequence divisibility/residue tests (5380) are EXCLUDED from the significance pool: they are invariant to structure shuffling and non-significant under the frequency-preserving null (see frequency_null_results); a uniform-integer null spuriously flags them because natural frequencies are Zipfian, not uniform
finding: 499 well-posed tests (scalar compression); 0 survive Bonferroni, 0 survive FDR (alpha=0.05). Min p=0.005718 vs Bonferroni threshold 0.0001002
